# trainers.gg ‚Äî Copilot Instructions

Pokemon community platform for competitive players. Turborepo monorepo with Next.js 16 web app, Expo 54 mobile app, Supabase backend, and Bluesky PDS integration.

## Monorepo Structure

```
apps/web/          ‚Äî Next.js 16 (React 19, App Router)
apps/mobile/       ‚Äî Expo 54 (React Native, Tamagui)
packages/supabase/ ‚Äî Supabase client, queries, migrations, edge functions
packages/validators/ ‚Äî Shared Zod schemas for forms, Server Actions, edge functions
packages/utils/    ‚Äî Shared utilities (formatting, countries, tiers, slug generation)
packages/tournaments/ ‚Äî Tournament logic (Swiss pairings, standings, brackets)
packages/pokemon/  ‚Äî Pokemon data, validation, team parsing
packages/posthog/  ‚Äî Shared PostHog event name constants
packages/theme/    ‚Äî Shared OKLCH color tokens for web and mobile
packages/atproto/  ‚Äî AT Protocol / Bluesky utilities
tooling/           ‚Äî ESLint, Prettier, Tailwind, TypeScript, test-utils configs
infra/pds/         ‚Äî Self-hosted Bluesky PDS on Fly.io
infra/ngrok/       ‚Äî Local dev tunnel
```

## Auto-Generated Files

`packages/supabase/src/types.ts` is auto-generated by `pnpm generate-types` from the current database schema. Never modify it manually. If types for a table are absent, the table was dropped ‚Äî that is intentional, not an error.

## TypeScript Conventions

- Strict mode: `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`, `noImplicitOverride`
- Type-only imports: `import { type Foo }` (not `import type { Foo }`)
- No `any` ‚Äî use `unknown` instead
- Unused variables: prefix with `_`
- Files: `kebab-case`. Components: `PascalCase`. Functions/vars: `camelCase`. Constants: `SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE`. Zod schemas: `camelCaseSchema`

## React Compiler

React Compiler is enabled (`reactCompiler: true` in `next.config.ts`). It handles memoization automatically across all packages. Never use `useMemo`, `useCallback`, or `React.memo` ‚Äî they conflict with compiler optimizations.

## Shared Packages vs App Code

Code in `packages/` must have zero framework imports ‚Äî pure logic usable by web, mobile, and edge functions. Framework-specific code (React hooks, Next.js infrastructure, Expo patterns) belongs in `apps/*/src/lib/`.

## Validation

All user input validation lives in `@trainers/validators` (shared package). Schemas use Zod with a transform+pipe pattern for trimming before validation:

```ts
// Trim, then validate length
z.string()
  .transform((val) => val.trim())
  .pipe(z.string().max(100));
```

Empty optional strings are transformed to `undefined` so downstream code doesn't need to handle `""`.

## Error Handling

- `throw new Error()` for validation failures
- Return `null` from queries when not found
- Server Actions return `{ success: boolean; error?: string }`

## Dynamic CSS Classes

Always use `cn()` from `@/lib/utils` for dynamic Tailwind classes. Template literals cause Tailwind purge issues.

## Design System

- Minimal flat design: no borders, subtle background differentiation
- Teal primary accent (OKLCH tokens from `@trainers/theme`)
- `StatusBadge` component for semantic status colors
- Never render raw enum/DB values in UI ‚Äî map to human-readable labels

## Testing

- Every feature/bugfix must include tests (CI enforces 60% patch coverage)
- Use Fishery factories from `@trainers/test-utils` ‚Äî never inline object literals
- Use `it.each` for parameterized tests
- Test domain logic and decisions, not framework behavior
